- Block with collapsed flag
  collapsed:: true
	- Child that is folded by default
- Block with an opaque id
  id:: 6f7a3c9e-1d4b-4a12-9b8c-2f4e5d6a7c1f
- Block with alias
  alias:: my-alias
- Block carrying a Logseq ordered-list type
  logseq.order-list-type:: number
	- First numbered child
	  logseq.order-list-type:: number
	- Second numbered child
	  logseq.order-list-type:: number
- Template block
  template:: meeting-1on1
  template-including-parent:: true
	- Topic 1
	- Topic 2
